flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mohawk Valley Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.8k → $8.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mohawk Valley Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.0% → 0.0%).
